title: Entity Eat Carried Item Behavior
description: If the mob is carrying a food item, the mob will eat it and the effects will be applied to the mob.

delay_before_eating.title: Delay Before Eating
delay_before_eating.description:
Time in seconds the mob should wait before eating the item.

Sample values:
• fox: 28

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• fox: 12
